title: Classify building sites
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Classify building sites demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare to classify site

pcs.text: Review job request and any accompanying documentation to identify purpose of site classification, proposed structure, client’s information needs and timeframe
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review job request and any accompanying documentation to identify purpose of site classification, proposed structure, client’s information needs and timeframe?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review job request and any accompanying documentation to identify purpose of site classification, proposed structure, client’s information needs and timeframe.

pcs.text: Review relevant building codes or regulations, standards and workplace procedures for classifying site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review relevant building codes or regulations, standards and workplace procedures for classifying site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review relevant building codes or regulations, standards and workplace procedures for classifying site.

pcs.text: Locate any previous site classifications conducted in same area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate any previous site classifications conducted in same area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate any previous site classifications conducted in same area.

pcs.text: Review supplied site drawings, topography, borehole locations and logs, photographs and design plans for planned structure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review supplied site drawings, topography, borehole locations and logs, photographs and design plans for planned structure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review supplied site drawings, topography, borehole locations and logs, photographs and design plans for planned structure.

pcs.text: Inspect supplied samples and investigation data for completeness and obvious errors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect supplied samples and investigation data for completeness and obvious errors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect supplied samples and investigation data for completeness and obvious errors.

pcs.text: Confirm that investigation data meets depth requirements for the type of site and location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that investigation data meets depth requirements for the type of site and location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that investigation data meets depth requirements for the type of site and location.

pcs.text: Liaise with client when supplied documentation, samples, investigation data and/or job request do not comply with workplace procedures and resolve any problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with client when supplied documentation, samples, investigation data and/or job request do not comply with workplace procedures and resolve any problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with client when supplied documentation, samples, investigation data and/or job request do not comply with workplace procedures and resolve any problems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to classify site

elements.title: Analyse site information and test results

pcs.text: Locate and assess site features, such as slope, structures, drainage, trees and vegetation or abnormal soil conditions that may affect site classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and assess site features, such as slope, structures, drainage, trees and vegetation or abnormal soil conditions that may affect site classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and assess site features, such as slope, structures, drainage, trees and vegetation or abnormal soil conditions that may affect site classification.

pcs.text: Determine if fill is present on-site, whether controlled or uncontrolled, and its depth and extent
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine if fill is present on-site, whether controlled or uncontrolled, and its depth and extent?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine if fill is present on-site, whether controlled or uncontrolled, and its depth and extent.

pcs.text: Determine bearing capacity of soil
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine bearing capacity of soil?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine bearing capacity of soil.

pcs.text: Review shrink/swell or correlated clay index test results to determine soil reactivity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review shrink/swell or correlated clay index test results to determine soil reactivity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review shrink/swell or correlated clay index test results to determine soil reactivity.

pcs.text: Review bore log data in conjunction with soil reactivity and calculate potential soil movement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review bore log data in conjunction with soil reactivity and calculate potential soil movement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review bore log data in conjunction with soil reactivity and calculate potential soil movement.

pcs.text: Recognise obvious errors, insufficient or inconsistent data and limitations of test results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise obvious errors, insufficient or inconsistent data and limitations of test results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise obvious errors, insufficient or inconsistent data and limitations of test results.

pcs.text: Arrange for, or conduct, additional sampling and/or testing to ensure reliable data for site classification, as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange for, or conduct, additional sampling and/or testing to ensure reliable data for site classification, as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange for, or conduct, additional sampling and/or testing to ensure reliable data for site classification, as required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Analyse site information and test results

elements.title: Report site classification

pcs.text: Use standard symbols and descriptors to assign a valid site classification that accurately reflects soil reactivity, surface movement and any problematic features
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use standard symbols and descriptors to assign a valid site classification that accurately reflects soil reactivity, surface movement and any problematic features?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use standard symbols and descriptors to assign a valid site classification that accurately reflects soil reactivity, surface movement and any problematic features.

pcs.text: Summarise field observations, calculations and test results used to determine site classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Summarise field observations, calculations and test results used to determine site classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Summarise field observations, calculations and test results used to determine site classification.

pcs.text: Accurately describe site features that will affect the design of the proposed structure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Accurately describe site features that will affect the design of the proposed structure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Accurately describe site features that will affect the design of the proposed structure.

pcs.text: Provide adequate data to inform footing system design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide adequate data to inform footing system design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide adequate data to inform footing system design.

pcs.text: Authorise release of site classification report to the client, or forward the report to a signatory for review and release
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Authorise release of site classification report to the client, or forward the report to a signatory for review and release?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Authorise release of site classification report to the client, or forward the report to a signatory for review and release.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Report site classification

elements.title: Finalise site classification

pcs.text: Store client’s documentation, samples and test data, and site classification in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store client’s documentation, samples and test data, and site classification in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store client’s documentation, samples and test data, and site classification in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain confidentiality of client information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain confidentiality of client information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain confidentiality of client information.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Finalise site classification
